title: OFSS Bihar Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: OFSS Bihar Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: OFSS Bihar Class 11 Result 2026 on the official website - ofssbihar.net.in on 05-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the OFSS Bihar 11th Result 2026.

content.text: The Online Facilitation System for Students (OFSS Bihar) has officially released the OFSS Bihar 11th Merit List 2026 for the academic session 2026-28. Students who applied for Class 11 (Intermediate) admissions can now check their selection status online. OFSS Bihar Result 2026 has been released on the official website ofssbihar.net.

The board has published the merit list for students across multiple streams including Arts, Science, Commerce, Agriculture, and Vocational. Students can easily check and download their intimation letter by entering their application number and registered mobile number on the official portal.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the merit list. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the concerned school, college, or Bihar School Examination Board for correction.

OFSS Bihar has released the 11th Merit List 2026 on its official website for the 2026-28 academic session. Students can access their selection status online using their application number and registered mobile number through the official portal. The merit list includes allotted school/ college details, stream information, and admission status for candidates.

rows: OFSS Bihar 11th Merit List 2026 / Intimation Letter
Online - Merit List / Intimation Letter download

sections.heading: Steps to Check OFSS Bihar 11th Merit List 2026

items: Visit the official OFSS Bihar website - ofssbihar.net.
On the homepage, click on the Class 11th / Intermediate 2026-28 admission or merit list section.
Look for the link titled 'OFSS Bihar 11th Merit List 2026' or 'Download Intimation Letter'.
Enter your application number and registered mobile number in the login page.
Submit the details to view your OFSS Bihar 11th merit list 2026 on the screen.
Download the intimation letter or merit list PDF and take a printout for admission and future reference.
Carefully check your name, allotted school / college, stream, and other details and contact the relevant authorities if any correction is needed.
